title: Query on assets throws error and response

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am using the below query to retrieve all the updates, the below query throws an error as well as response. Is this an expected behavior?

{
  updates(page: 12, limit: 100) {
    assets {
      created_at
      file_extension
      file_size
      id
      name
       uploaded_by{
            birthday
      }
      original_geometry
      public_url
      url
      url_thumbnail
    }
  }
}

image963×575 35.3 KB

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Yash!

Thanks for bringing this to our attention. This is unexpected behavior. I’ll pass this on to my team for a fix.
